# DenseNeuroVol { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol }

```python
DenseNeuroVol(data, space, label='', indices=None, *, provenance=None)
```

Dense 3D neuroimaging volume.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type                                           | Description                                              | Default    |
|---------|------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| data    | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | 3D array of voxel values                                 | _required_ |
| space   | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`) | Spatial metadata                                         | _required_ |
| label   | [str](`str`)                                   | Volume label                                             | `''`       |
| indices | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | If provided, only these indices will be filled with data | `None`     |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [as_array](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_array) | Convert to numpy array. |
| [as_dense](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_dense) | Already dense, return self. |
| [as_logical](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_logical) | Convert to logical representation. |
| [as_mask](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_mask) | Convert to mask. |
| [as_sparse](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_sparse) | Convert to sparse representation. |
| [concat](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.concat) | Concatenate multiple volumes into a DenseNeuroVec along a new time dimension. |
| [values](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.values) | Get underlying data values. |

### as_array { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_array }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.as_array()
```

Convert to numpy array.

### as_dense { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_dense }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.as_dense()
```

Already dense, return self.

### as_logical { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_logical }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.as_logical()
```

Convert to logical representation.

### as_mask { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_mask }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.as_mask(indices=None)
```

Convert to mask.

### as_sparse { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.as_sparse }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.as_sparse(mask=None)
```

Convert to sparse representation.

### concat { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.concat }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.concat(*others)
```

Concatenate multiple volumes into a DenseNeuroVec along a new time dimension.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type                                               | Description                        | Default   |
|---------|----------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|-----------|
| *others | [DenseNeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vol.DenseNeuroVol`) | Additional volumes to concatenate. | `()`      |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                               | Description                                                   |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | [DenseNeuroVec](`neuroim.neuro_vec.DenseNeuroVec`) | 4D vector containing all volumes stacked along the time axis. |

### values { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVol.values }

```python
DenseNeuroVol.values()
```

Get underlying data values.
